evals.prompt: 我们是工银资本，这是我们在看的一个C轮项目「智象未来 HiDream.ai」发来的商业计划书。麻烦帮我生成一份深度分析画像，机构团队标签写「工银资本」，密级声明和格式按你熟悉的机构内部尽调报告惯例来就行，日期用材料里能看到的最新日期或今天。BP文件路径：/Users/dongtian/Desktop/日常工作/BP/2026智象未来商业计划书 - C轮 V4 - 工银资本.pdf
evals.expected_output: A formatted .docx investment deep-dive memo covering company overview, team, tech/product, competitive landscape, and investment judgment (positive + risk signals + open questions), branded for 工银资本, faithful to the BP's actual content and supplemented with real web research.
files: /Users/dongtian/Desktop/日常工作/BP/2026智象未来商业计划书 - C轮 V4 - 工银资本.pdf

assertions.text: Report names the company as 智象未来 / HiDream.ai
Report states the company was founded in 2023.03 (or '2023年3月')
Report names founder/CEO 梅涛 with a specific credential (e.g. 加拿大工程院院士 / ACM/IEEE Fellow), not just a title
Report describes the core technical architecture as full-modal / UiT (全模态 / Unified Transformer), not just 'multimodal'
Report cites the HiDream-O1-Image benchmark result (Artificial Analysis leaderboard, China #1 / Global #2 or equivalent ranking claim) with the specific evaluation date if available
Report names at least two of the three commercialization products (HiBurst / 帧赞Ai(ZhenZan) / vivago) and what each targets
Report names at least one concrete customer or platform partner from the deck (e.g. 腾讯视频《青铜诡事录》, TikTok, SHEIN, 致欧家居/SONGMICS)
Report includes the revenue trajectory figures from the deck (2025 ~1亿, 2028E ~20亿, 2029-2030E 100亿+) or explicitly flags them as company projections, not verified facts
Report names at least two real prior investors from the deck's investor logos (e.g. 深创投, 东方富海, 商汤, 科大讯飞, 京东, 金浦投资)
Report does NOT invent a specific fundraise amount or valuation for this C round — the deck does not disclose one, only fund-use percentages (50/30/20)

Report includes a competitive-landscape section naming at least 2 real external competitors researched from public sources (e.g. Kling/可灵, Seedance/字节跳动, Runway, Vidu/生数科技, Google Veo/Nano Banana, OpenAI Sora), not merely the benchmark chart labels copied verbatim
Report contains all fixed template sections: 公司概览与定位, 核心团队, 技术或产品底盘, 竞争格局与差异化, 投资判断, 附录
Report has a distinct 风险信号 (risk signals) subsection with at least 3 concrete, non-generic risks (not just polite caveats)
Report has a 核心待验证问题 (open due-diligence questions) list with specific, answerable questions (not generic 'what are your future plans')
Output .docx opens without corruption and contains a cover page, a table of contents element, and at least 5 tables
Every page's footer/cover shows the '工银资本' branding as instructed, not a placeholder or the sample's original '工银投资' label
Team section ends with a synthesis judgment paragraph that names both a strength and a specific risk/open question (not pure praise)
